enum_values.name: Show
enum_values.summary: Dock bar shown or made visible

enum_values.name: Hide
enum_values.summary: Dock bar hidden, no longer visible

enum_values.name: HideOnDeactivate
enum_values.summary: Dock bar temporarily hidden because the main Rhino application is no longer active.

enum_values.name: ShowOnDeactivate
enum_values.summary: Dock bar that was temporarily hidden when the main Rhino application was deactivated is now being shown.
